title: myosotis sylvatica subsp. subarvensis
intro: Myosotis sylvatica subsp. subarvensis, also known as woodland forget-me-not, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Myosotis sylvatica subsp. subarvensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
